description_long: This cabinetry unit features a modern kitchen setup with a combination of base and wall cabinets. The base section includes a built-in oven, a four-burner electric cooktop with red burner indicators, and a stainless steel sink with a single faucet. The lower cabinets are finished in a light wood veneer, with three drawers and two doors, while the countertop is a speckled light stone or composite material. The upper section consists of four large, flat-panel wall cabinets in a matte white finish, providing ample storage. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens.
description: A modern kitchen cabinetry set with wood base cabinets, a stone countertop, built-in oven, cooktop, sink, and matte white wall cabinets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oven, cooktop, sink, drawers, and both base and wall cabinets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinetry and the overhanging wall cabinets above the countertop.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the cabinetry and the countertop with cooktop and sink.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the cooktop and the alignment of the wall and base cabinets.
attribute_door_configuration: combination of double door and drawers
